title: I Just Wanna Run
group_key: i just wanna run|the downtown fiction

lyrics.text: I just wanna run hide it away
lyrics.translation: 我只想逃之夭夭，销声匿迹

lyrics.text: Run because they're chasing me down
lyrics.translation: 只因他们已将我逼上绝路

lyrics.text: I just wanna run throw it away
lyrics.translation: 我想要高飞远走，心无旁骛

lyrics.text: Run before they’re finding me out
lyrics.translation: 在他们找到我之前逃遁而去

lyrics.text: I just wanna run
lyrics.translation: 超轶绝尘

lyrics.text: I just wanna run
lyrics.translation: 逸尘断鞅

lyrics.text: I'm out here all alone
lyrics.translation: 我孤立无援

lyrics.text: I try to call your house
lyrics.translation: 我试着打电话向你家去

lyrics.text: Can't reach you on the phone
lyrics.translation: 却被告知无法接通

lyrics.text: I'll gather up the nerve
lyrics.translation: 我干脆一鼓作气

lyrics.text: I'm packing up my bag
lyrics.translation: 背上行囊

lyrics.text: It's more than you deserve
lyrics.translation: 而这一切都是你罪有应得

lyrics.text: Don't treat me like a drag
lyrics.translation: 请不要再视我如草木之人

lyrics.text: I'm feelin' like I keep on talking
lyrics.translation: 我感觉我滔滔不绝

lyrics.text: I'm repeating myself' my words lost all meaning
lyrics.translation: 不断强调自己直到变成冗词赘句

lyrics.text: I keep talking I repeat myself
lyrics.translation: 我就这样不停地自我暗示

lyrics.text: I just wanna run hide it away
lyrics.translation: 我只希望逃之夭夭，销声匿迹

lyrics.text: Run because they're chasing me down
lyrics.translation: 只因他们已将我逼上绝路

lyrics.text: I just wanna run throw it away
lyrics.translation: 我只想要高飞远走，心无旁骛

lyrics.text: Run before they're finding me out
lyrics.translation: 在他们找到我前逃遁而去

lyrics.text: I just wanna run （run run run）
lyrics.translation: 我只想逃避（逃吧，逃吧，逃吧）

lyrics.text: I just wanna run
lyrics.translation: 我只想逃跑

lyrics.text: （run run run）
lyrics.translation: （跑吧，跑吧，跑吧）

lyrics.text: Like a game of chess
lyrics.translation: 如同晦暗不明的棋局

lyrics.text: I predict your move
lyrics.translation: 我预测着你的一举一动

lyrics.text: I think I know you better
lyrics.translation: 我想我对你已然是了如指掌

lyrics.text: Better than you do
lyrics.translation: 甚至是冰寒于水

lyrics.text: I'm sick of feeling cheap
lyrics.translation: 我早已厌倦了百无一用的无力感

lyrics.text: Cheated and abused
lyrics.translation: 被欺骗着，被辱骂着

lyrics.text: Sick of losing sleep
lyrics.translation: 厌倦了难以入眠的辗转反侧

lyrics.text: Thinking about you
lyrics.translation: 回想起你

lyrics.text: I'm feelin' like I keep on talking
lyrics.translation: 我感觉我滔滔不绝

lyrics.text: I'm repeating myself' my words lost all meaning
lyrics.translation: 不断强调自己直到变成冗词赘句

lyrics.text: I keep talking I repeat myself
lyrics.translation: 我就这样不停地自我暗示

lyrics.translation: 我只希望逃之夭夭，销声匿迹

lyrics.translation: 只因他们已将我逼上绝路

lyrics.translation: 我只想要高飞远走，心无旁骛

lyrics.text: Run before they're finding me out
lyrics.translation: 在他们找到我前逃遁而去

lyrics.translation: 我只想逃避（逃吧，逃吧，逃吧）

lyrics.translation: 我只想逃跑（跑吧，跑吧，跑吧）

lyrics.translation: 在他们找到我前逃遁而去
